name: Stained-Glass Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a round 23 cm cake tin and line with greaseproof paper.
2. Butter the greaseproof paper.
3. Chop the glace fruits roughly.
4. Sift together the flour and baking powder.
5. Mix in all the fruits, along with the nuts, using your hands to combine everything thoroughly.
6. Place the mixture into the cake tin and press down firmly with wet hands.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 150°C for 1½ hours.
8. Remove the cake from the oven and drizzle the Grand Marnier or Cointreau over the top.
9. Leave the cake in the oven to cool, then wrap it, tin and all, in aluminum foil and refrigerate overnight.
10. Remove from the tin, peel away the paper, and store in an airtight tin.
